_doc: Integration + scan schedule. n_steps discretizes s in [0,1] for the SDE/ODE; scan_points are the progress values s at which we fork (commitment) and probe (readout). K_forks forks per scan point; N_independent full generations for the video-prior A_independent. g_kind/g_value define the diffusion scale g(s) (sigma = alpha * g(s)).
